info.name: Dealer Hygiene Compliance Backend
info.description:
Complete API collection for the Dealer Hygiene Compliance Backend.

Setup:
1. Run 'POST /auth/login' with Super Admin credentials first.
2. The access_token is auto-saved to the collection variable.
3. All subsequent requests use it via Bearer auth.

Hierarchy: Country -> Zone -> Facility (Dealership) -> Checkpoints + Categories (facility-scoped, many-to-many)

body.raw:
{
  "zone_id": "{{zoneId}}",
  "name": "Mumbai Motors Pvt Ltd",
  "code": "MUM-001",
  "address": "42 Marine Drive, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400001",
  "dealer_name": "Rajesh Sharma",
  "dealer_phone": "+91-9876543210",
  "dealer_email": "rajesh.sharma@mumbaimotors.com",
  "dealer_designation": "General Manager",
  "email": "mumbai.motors@dealer.com",
  "password": "Dealer@1234"
}

item.name: Categories (Facility-Scoped)
item.description: Facility-scoped categories. DEALERSHIP creates; EMPLOYEE can view. Login as Dealership first.

item.name: Checkpoints (Facility-Scoped)
item.description: Checkpoints are areas inside a facility. Creating requires an image upload (multipart/form-data). Login as Dealership first.

formdata.description: Select an image (JPEG/PNG) of the checkpoint area
Optional if logged in as Dealership

item.name: Checkpoint-Category Assignments
item.description: Many-to-many: assign categories to checkpoints. Both must belong to the same facility.
